heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 2718 Authorization of appropriations
notes: Amendments1997—Subsec. (a). amended subsec. (a) generally. Prior to amendment, subsec. (a) read as follows: “Subject to the provisions of , there are hereby authorized to be appropriated for fiscal year 1998, and for each fiscal year thereafter, an amount equal to the amount of funds derived from the assessments authorized by for the fiscal year immediately preceding the fiscal year involved, for the operation of the Commission.”Pub. L. 105–119section 2717 of this titlesection 2717(a) of this title, substituted “for fiscal year 1998, and for each fiscal year thereafter, an amount equal to the amount of funds derived from the assessments authorized by for the fiscal year immediately preceding the fiscal year involved,” for “such sums as may be necessary”.Pub. (b) which read as follows: “Notwithstanding the provisions of , there are hereby authorized to be appropriated not to exceed $2,000,000 to fund the operation of the Commission for each of the fiscal years beginning , and . Notwithstanding the provisions of , there are authorized to be appropriated such sums as may be necessary to fund the operation of the Commission for each of the fiscal years beginning , and .”Pub. children.label: a
children.text: Subject to , there are authorized to be appropriated, for fiscal year 1998, and for each fiscal year thereafter, an amount equal to the amount of funds derived from the assessments authorized by .section 2717 of this titlesection 2717(a) of this title

children.label: b
children.text: Notwithstanding , there are authorized to be appropriated to fund the operation of the Commission, $2,000,000 for fiscal year 1998, and $2,000,000 for each fiscal year thereafter. The amounts authorized to be appropriated in the preceding sentence shall be in addition to the amounts authorized to be appropriated under subsection (a).section 2717 of this title
